articles.title: Wolvaardt, Mlaba complete comprehensive 4-1 series win for South Africa
articles.description: Wolvaardt's 92* took the hosts to 155 and India never got going in the chase

articles.title: MI sign Maharaj as replacement for injured Santner
articles.description: Santner hurt his shoulder in the field against Chennai Super Kings

articles.title: Former Zimbabwe captain Mary-Anne Musonda retires from all forms of cricket
articles.description: She was part of the Zimbabwe setup since 2006 and was appointed captain in 2018

articles.title: Hridoy, Parvez, Shamim pull off record home chase for Bangladesh
articles.description: Rishad helped restrict New Zealand to 182 before the batting trio played quickfire knocks in the chase

articles.title: Tanzid Hasan, Amite Hasan earn maiden call-ups to Bangladesh Test squad
articles.description: Bangladesh have also recalled Taskin Ahmed, while Khaled Ahmed and Jaker Ali are notable omissions

articles.title: Deepti's maiden T20I five-for downs South Africa
articles.description: India's 14-run victory leaves the scoreline 3-1 with a match to play, and has asked questions of the hosts' depth

articles.title: Bates to retire from international cricket after T20 World Cup
articles.description: "I have one final mission: to head to the UK and win another World Cup," she says

articles.title: BCB withdraws NOCs for Mustafizur Rahman, Nahid Rana for remainder of PSL 2026
articles.description: Mustafizur has been nursing a knee injury and Rana will manage his workload

articles.title: Shanto century, Mustafizur five-for seals series win for Bangladesh
articles.description: Dean Foxcroft's late charge, during which he put up a fifty-run stand with No. 11 Ben Lister, could not get New Zealand over the line

articles.title: Akash Deep to miss Afghanistan Test, eyes Duleep Trophy comeback in September
articles.description: The Bengal pacer was ruled out of IPL 2026 due to a lower back stress injury.

articles.title: New Zealand announce youthful squad for ODI series vs England
articles.description: The White Ferns have been in good form ahead of their series in the United Kingdom. They defeated both Zimbabwe and South Africa at home to maintain an unbeaten start to the 2026 calendar year.
